commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer product and safety review is needed because the remaining action is deciding whether to expose and document this relay-disable policy, not a mechanical fix.; Needs attention: The diff adds an opt-in that can disable native Codex hook relay enforcement, so maintainers should explicitly approve that safety boundary before merge. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Codex plugin `appServer.nativeHookRelay` config schema and metadata, then uses it to pass enabled/disabled native hook relay policy into Codex app-server attempts and side questions with parser and harness tests.

PR surface: Source +72, Tests +150. Total +222 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main hard-enables Codex native hook relay and upstream Codex executes matched command hooks as child processes. I did not run a live multi-agent load reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer product and safety review is needed because the remaining action is deciding whether to expose and document this relay-disable policy, not a mechanical fix.
